title: 消息轰炸
content:
炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸炸 from pynput.keyboard import Key, Controller import time /*注：发送前需要将键盘设置为英文输入模式！*/ keyboard = Controller() a = input("请输入你需要循环输出的内容:") b = eval(input("请输入你想循环输出的次数:")) print("数据已接收, 请将光标移动到会话框") time.sleep(1) for i in range(b): # 设置发送次数 keyboard.type(a) time.sleep(1) keyboard.press(Key.enter) keyboard.release(Key.enter) print('消息发送完成!') ## 下载依赖包:pip install pynput

这里是警告。

这里是提示

title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to [Hexo](https://hexo.io/)! This is your very first post. Check [documentation](https://hexo.io/docs/) for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in [troubleshooting](https://hexo.io/docs/troubleshooting.html) or you can ask me on [GitHub](https://github.com/hexojs/hexo/issues).

## Quick Start

### Create a new post

``` bash
$ hexo new "My New Post"
```
